---
title: "Angelika phantom: a three-dimensional tool for quality control in gynecologic brachytherapy"
date: 2025-11-03
author:
  - name: Maciel, J. O.
  - name: Silva, R. M. V.
  - name: Araujo, A. S.
  - name: Souza, D. N.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "The European Physical Journal Special Topics"
  doi: "10.1140/epjs/s11734-025-02054-4"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Angelika phantom: a three-dimensional tool for quality control in gynecologic brachytherapy</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
